settings.text:
Dr. Chris has dedicated his life to helping people have clearer lungs so they can breathe better. As a former Army Combat Medic and later a Doctor of Pharmacy, he saw the limits of traditional medicine.

"When some family members, many of whom are smokers, asked for natural ways to improve lung health, I dove into the research and what I found was life-changing!"

settings.subtext: We compile a list of natural ingredients that have been used in the past to target a specific health need.
We carefully cross-reference each ingredient with the latest scientific research to understand everything about its safety, function, and potential interactions.
We source our ingredients from safe and reputable suppliers that meet our quality standards.
We iterate several formulations before we end up with a precisely dosed combination of ingredients that are safe and intended to be taken daily.
We send every batch of product to a third-party lab to ensure it’s pure. You can read our Certificates of Analysis at HealthLoq.
We package our product and distribute to our retail partners, Amazon, and our loyal subscriber base.

settings.title: Clinically Inspired, Expert Trusted
settings.content: Every formula is developed using clinically informed principles and ingredient research, earning the trust of health-focused professionals and thousands of customers.

settings.title: Ingredients That Work Together
settings.content: Our ingredients are intentionally selected and combined to work in synergy: supporting better absorption, balance, and more effective results than single-ingredient solutions.

settings.title: 365-Day Money Back Guarantee*
settings.content: We stand behind our products with a full 365-day money-back guarantee, giving you the confidence to try BetterBrand completely risk-free for an entire year.

settings.question: Does This Help With COPD, Asthma, Bronchitis, Or The Common Cold?
settings.answer: We designed BetterLungs® to support healthy respiratory and immune systems while keeping everyone in mind. Our ingredients have been studied extensively in many settings! With that said, no supplement can make claims regarding any diagnosis. As always, we recommend that you check with your doctor or pharmacist before starting any new dietary supplement as they have your full medical history available

settings.question: Is It Safe To Take COPD And/Or Asthma Medication With BetterLungs?
settings.answer: While all of our formulations are pieced together by a Doctor of Pharmacy, we recommend that you check with your doctor or pharmacist before starting any new dietary supplement as they have your full medical history available.

settings.question: Does This Help My Lungs If I Vape Or Smoke?
settings.answer: The ingredients in BetterLungs were selected with smokers, and their lung health, in mind. The idea for the product came from our Chief Scientist who wanted to help the smokers in his family and those with chronic bronchitis and COPD.

settings.question: Can I Take This For Extended Periods Of Time?
settings.answer: Most of the ingredients work better the longer you take them, so definitely!

settings.question: How Long Does It Take For This Product To Work?
settings.answer: While some customers notice positive effects in the first few days, we tell our customers to give the product 4 weeks for maximum effect.

settings.question: How can I get in touch with the team?
settings.answer: If you have questions, you can give us a call at 1-877-851-8979 or email us at hello@betterbrandhealth.com.
